skillPacks.name: AntFleet aeon-skills
skillPacks.description: On-demand two-model-consensus PR review (Claude Opus + GPT) with on-chain USDC payment channel on Base. Pull-mode counterpart to AntFleet's auto-review GitHub App.
skillPacks.author: AntFleet

skillPacks.name: aeon-skill-pack-vvvkernel
skillPacks.description: Venice AI inference via VVVKernel — onchain, audit, growth, narrative, image gen, monitoring.
skillPacks.author: baseddevoloper

skillPacks.name: luca-aeon-skills
skillPacks.description: Financial intelligence via x402Books AI — wallet scanning, treasury monitoring, financial reports, agent registry on Base.
skillPacks.author: danbuildss

skillPacks.name: zer0-skill-pack
skillPacks.description: Polymarket intelligence — daily theses, mispricing scans, contrarian fades, narrative-vs-markets gaps, paper-trade PnL journal, alpha comment curation.
skillPacks.author: ZER0 LABS

skillPacks.name: GitBounty Skill Pack
skillPacks.description: Bounty hunting on the gitlawb network — discovers open bounties via the gitbounty firehose, scouts the best fit, drafts a PR plan with a confidence score.
skillPacks.author: gitlawbounty

skillPacks.name: LiquidPad
skillPacks.description: Track LiquidPad on Base — $LPAD burn cycle alerts, new token launches with onchain provenance, daily protocol digest, and fee-accrual tracking on every launched token.
skillPacks.author: liquidpadbot

skillPacks.name: aeon-skill-pack-mythosforge
skillPacks.description: Read-only MythosForge monitoring — ops/backlog/jury/payout health, proof-of-creation integrity on Base, theme/round guard against silent relabels, jury-drift detection, and live gallery/proof-page QA.
skillPacks.author: ryjin111

skillPacks.name: demo-pack
skillPacks.description: Holographic demo skill — proves the Sparkleware registry install pipeline works.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: aeon-pulse
skillPacks.description: Daily activity summary for the Aeon framework — recent commits, releases, and open issues.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: registry-watch
skillPacks.description: Daily digest of new packs added to the Sparkleware registry — discover community skills without manually browsing.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: arxiv-digest
skillPacks.description: Daily digest of newest AI / autonomous-agent papers on arXiv — top submissions in cs.AI, cs.LG, cs.MA.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: hn-top
skillPacks.description: Daily digest of HackerNews top stories — dev / startup / AI conversation in one screen.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: eth-gas-watch
skillPacks.description: Ethereum gas-price status check on a schedule — flags cheap windows for batching on-chain ops.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: morning-briefing
skillPacks.description: Daily morning briefing — date, day-of-week, current weather, and a sparkly closer. No API key required.
skillPacks.author: sparkleware

skillPacks.name: aeon-skill-pack-noelclaw
skillPacks.description: Persistent versioned memory and multi-agent swarm coordination — save typed artifacts to Noel Vault and manage shared agent session state across runs.
skillPacks.author: noelclaw

skillPacks.name: signa
skillPacks.description: The full SIGNA skill suite — wallet-signed cross-platform agent messaging, multi-agent coordination (broadcast and delegate across the network), plus integrations with Aeon ecosystem partners already on Base: Bankr resolver and recent launches, gitlawb activity for any wallet, MiroShark sim stats and wallet-signed sim fire. Lives at aeon-skills/ inside the SIGNA monorepo so the wire format, SDKs, and skill pack all version together.
skillPacks.author: signa-agent
